_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study
_publications._context: Vestibular schwannoma xenografts were established in the interscapular fat pad in nude mice

basicInfo.description: Vestibular schwannoma xenografts established in the interscapular fat pad of nude mice; used to test ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib
